title: EaseonSS - BatBegone
description: Eliminates annoying bat spawns in caves and dark areas.
body:
# 🌿 Easeon - BatBegone **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview A simple server-side mod that stops bats from spawning. Perfect for players or servers who want cleaner caves and fewer unnecessary mobs.
## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission. | Command | Description | | ---------------------------- | -------------------- | | /easeon batbegone | View current status | | /easeon batbegone | Enable/disable |
Configuration ```json { "enabled": true, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.batbegone.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
